hero.title: Une enquête, construite autour, de vos proches.
hero.subtitle: Vrais noms. Vraies relations. Vrai drame. Nous créons un pack d'enquête entièrement personnalisé et prêt à imprimer — en quelques minutes.

why.title: Pas juste un kit. Votre kit.
why.desc: Tous les autres packs d'enquête vous donnent une histoire fixe avec des espaces vides à remplir. Nous générons l'ensemble autour de votre liste d'invités réelle — noms, relations et tout le drame — afin que chaque indice, personnage et confession semble avoir été écrit juste pour votre fête.

guestStory.title: Histoire spécifique aux invités
guestStory.desc: Dites-nous qui vient et leurs relations. Nous intégrons les vrais noms et dynamiques directement dans le récit.

evidence.title: Images de preuves réelles
evidence.desc: Faux SMS, captures d'écran DM et reçus — tous générés pour correspondre à votre histoire. Des preuves qui nomment réellement vos invités.

instant.title: Prêt à imprimer en quelques minutes
instant.desc: Téléchargez votre pack complet — guide de l'hôte, livrets de personnages et preuves — tout est formaté et prêt à imprimer.

steps.title: Votre fête est organisée en 3 étapes.
steps.subtitle: Pas de planification. Pas de stress. Pas de spoilers pour l'hôte.

step1.title: Choisissez un thème qui convient à votre groupe
step1.desc: Scandale de célébrités ? Speakeasy des années 1920 ? Drame d'ex ? Choisissez l'ambiance — on s'occupe du reste.

step2.title: Dites-nous qui vient
step2.desc: Ajoutez vos noms d'invités et leurs relations. Plus vous donnez de détails, plus l'enquête devient drôle et personnelle.

step3.title: Téléchargez et jouez
step3.desc: Votre pack complet est prêt en moins de 20 minutes. Partagez-le numériquement ou imprimez-le à la maison.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions.
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about hosting a personalized murder mystery.
faqPage.seoDescription: Got questions about our custom murder mystery parties? Read our FAQ to learn how our games work, how to customize characters, and more.

questions.q: What exactly is a custom murder mystery party?
questions.a: Unlike generic kits, our mysteries are generated specifically for your guest list. We take the names, relationships, and dynamics of your real-life friends and weave them into a unique story where everyone gets a character, motives, and secrets tailored to them.

First, you pick a theme (like 1920s Speakeasy or Gala Heist). Then, you enter your guests' names and how they know each other. Within 20 minutes, our platform generates a complete, print-ready pack including a host guide, character packets, clues, and AI-generated evidence.

questions.q: Can I still play as the host?
questions.a: Yes — and that's by design. The host guide tells you exactly when to reveal each clue without spoiling the ending for you. You get to play along as a character and solve the mystery with everyone else.

questions.q: Do I need to print everything?
questions.a: Nope! You can share character packets and clues digitally via PDF. If you prefer the tactile experience, everything comes formatted and ready to print at home.

questions.q: What if my guest list changes last minute?
questions.a: Reach out to us within 24 hours of your download, and we'll help you re-generate your pack with the updated guest list at no extra cost.

questions.q: How long does a game typically last?
questions.a: Depending on the complexity you choose, our games typically last between 1.5 to 3 hours. This makes them perfect for dinner parties, hens nights, or weekend getaways.

questions.q: Is this suitable for work events or corporate team building?
questions.a: Absolutely. Our themes are rated 16+ by default and focus on drama, intrigue, and fun without inappropriate content. Themes like 'The Gala Heist' work exceptionally well for corporate groups.

questions.q: Can I buy a pack as a gift?
questions.a: Yes! You can purchase a pack and give it to the organizer. They can then input their own guest list and download the customized mystery.
We are a fully digital platform. This means you don't have to wait for shipping, and you receive your completely customized, high-quality digital assets in under 20 minutes.

questions.q: How do you handle character appearances in the evidence?
questions.a: On our Premium and Grand tiers, you can customize character appearances (hair, eyes, style) so that the AI-generated evidence images perfectly match your group.
